properties.description: Daily check on pipeline status and data quality thresholds. Runs after the main batch to see if we need to wake anyone up.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT TOP 1
    pipeline_name,
    status,
    input_rows,
    output_rows,
    quarantine_rows,
    event_timestamp,
    CASE WHEN quarantine_rows * 1.0 / NULLIF(input_rows, 0) * 100 > @{pipeline().parameters.quarantineThresholdPct} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS threshold_breached
FROM metadata.pipeline_audit_log
WHERE pipeline_name = 'PL_Master_Orchestration'
    AND status IN ('COMPLETED', 'FAILED')
ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC

expression.value: @or(equals(activity('Get Last Run Status').output.firstRow.status, 'FAILED'), equals(activity('Get Last Run Status').output.firstRow.threshold_breached, 1))
